reviews.comment:
No hay lugar para estacionar seas socio o no, hay una playa de estacionamiento propia que le arrancan la cabeza a los socios. Muy malo el servicio.

(Translated by Google)
There's no parking available, whether you're a member or not; they have their own parking lot and they charge members exorbitant prices. The service is terrible.
